  "brief_explanation": "The degree of operating leverage (DOL) is least when production levels are such that the contribution margin per unit equals fixed costs. Given a unit contribution margin of $20 and fixed costs of $500,000, DOL is minimized at approximately 300,000 units."
}

financial_answer.brief_explanation: The degree of operating leverage (DOL) is least when production levels are such that the contribution margin per unit equals fixed costs. Given a unit contribution margin of $20 and fixed costs of $500,000, DOL is minimized at approximately 300,000 units.
